creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
For the fist time in years, my AlderLake Lenovo T16 is playing correctly! Something is fixed. I can't recall the firefox command to confirm which backend is actually being used, so it's possible that it is not OSS. In the past I had deleted all backends to force it to use OSS as it seemed it was ignoring the media.cubeb.backend, but I guess it is supposed to work, now.

I'll install and test other backends when I get time.
